---
Peter,

Tomorrow night is our first public FEC filing deadline of this campaign, and I've never needed you with me more. There is one major goal ahead of us that we can only achieve together:
| | **Bring in as many individual donations as we can.** We need at least 65,000 donors to make the debate stage and share our people-first vision. **[Will you make a donation of any amount right now?](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c95/2ae112ef/135a730f/357d817c/4241412218/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5NTItZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2952-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
---
This is a big goal, and I know we can't reach without you. I'm relying on you to get me to the debates, show that the grassroots are stronger than corporate greed and help us hit our $200,000 FEC goal before midnight.
**[Will you make your first donation to help hit our end-of-quarter goal before the FEC deadline tomorrow night and make sure our vision is represented on the debate stage? No corporate PACs, no fossil fuel money, no federal lobbyists, no super PAC--I'm counting on you to power this community-led campaign to defeat Trump.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c95/2ae112ef/135a730f/357d817c/4241412218/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5NTItZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2952-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

This is when we show exactly who we are. And you have to be part of making it happen. So I'm asking you right now:
**[Donate $5 or more right now before the end-of-quarter FEC deadline tomorrow night to help power this campaign forward to defeat Trump and make sure our vision is represented on the debate stage.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c95/2ae112ef/135a730f/357d817c/4241412218/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5NTItZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2952-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

| | | Friend - We know that elections in Georgia, and across much of our country, are not fair. Voters are systematically suppressed and disenfranchised. We are fighting to change that. Fair Fight was founded with a promise to Georgia's voters that we fight for free and fair elections becauses the votes and voices of every person matter. Our self-determination as a country is tied to our ability to elect our leaders, to have our votes counted and our voices heard. If eligible voters in Georgia can't access fair elections, then our democracy nationwide is undercut. From electing members of Congress to our next President, the will of the people is expressed through the ballot box and affects what we will do about our nation's biggests issues. When voter suppression persists anywhere in the country, our collective ambitions are not possible. For too long, those in power have worked to silence our voices by making it harder to vote. We are fighting back. **Will you join us a guardian of democracy? Text "FAIR" to 70700 to join the fight and learn how to take action in your community.** Every battle Fair Fight takes on is a fight for our democracy. In November, we filed a federal lawsuit challenging the gross mismanagement of the 2018 election in Georgia. Last week, our team traveled to south and west Georgia to hear the stories of voters from all over the state. We continue to do this work on the ground - listening to and organizing with voters - because we know that is how we win. Yours in the fight,
Team Fair Fight

I want to talk to you about the 2020 elections ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek:

I want to talk to you about the 2020 elections, and a really important way for us to make progress: taking back the Senate!

We're all fired up and ready to put a Democrat in the Oval Office and restore common sense to the White House -- but it is just as important that we focus on the other critical elections that are happening all across the country. Gaining a majority in the Senate is a big deal for American families -- _and so is losing Democratic seats_. There's a lot at stake here.

My friend and colleague Tina Smith just won her Senate seat in a special election in Minnesota this past November, and she's up for re-election in 2020. She's the only Senate Democrat who has to run back-to-back like this, so she's facing a big challenge. The fact is, Tina hasn't had four or five years to build up the fundraising foundation that she needs to win. **[**Will you make a donation today to support Tina and help her get ready to win in 2020?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1743/3e0906/7b8686ba/3e30ace5/2950526561/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-smith-2020?amount=25&refcode=20190330_1_FR_TK_Smith&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+make+a+donation+today+to+suppor&utm_campaign=20190330_1_FR_TK_Smith&source=20190330_1_FR_TK_Smith") ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ****[**$15**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1743/3e0906/7b8686ba/3e30ace4/2950526561/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-smith-2020?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20190330_1_FR_TK_Smith&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+15&utm_campaign=20190330_1_FR_TK_Smith&source=20190330_1_FR_TK_Smith")****

Tina's seat is a must-win if Democrats are going to take back the Senate majority. We need her around to fight for the issues that matter to all Americans, like access to high-quality, affordable health care, campaign finance reform, support for our farmers and our rural communities, and lower prescription drug prices.

****Tomorrow is Tina's first public fundraising deadline of the year. I know what it's like to have these big deadlines. It means that your results come under the microscope, and people look to the reports to see if you've got grassroots support on your side. That's why I'm asking you to step up today and show that you have Tina's back:**

Tim

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: short note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
We need a big day today

Friends, a short note before the day gets away from us:
**Tomorrow at midnight we close the books on our first official FEC fundraising deadline.** When that happens, we’ll publicly disclose not just how much money we’ve raised but how many donations make up that number.
**We set a goal of 1 million individual donations before it ends.** We chose to focus on the people not the money, because that is the strength of our campaign.
**But right now we’re behind on the pace we need to get there.** So we’re hoping a big day today can help us close the gap. That’s why we have to ask:
[**Can you make a donation - of any amount - before our first, official FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close tomorrow? We would not be pushing for this goal if this report were not so important.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10226?refcode=em190330-1-120&t=1&akid=888%2E150750%2EfHPr1a)
Every single donation we report sends a message that our campaign is building the kind of movement capable of not just beating Trump, but transforming our country. Thank you for powering this effort.
Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe using this link**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=888%2E150750%2EfHPr1a). If you want to receive fewer emails, [just tell us here](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=888%2E150750%2EfHPr1a). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=888_150750_fHPr1a&akid=888%2E150750%2EfHPr1a).

body:
Hello,
My team says that 2019 is shaping up to be the worst March we've seen for fundraising -- far worse than the numbers we posted in 2017 and 2018.
It's not dire, but we do need $3 or more from you before tomorrow's deadline if we're going to fill the gap. I'd be so appreciative if you could donate $3 or more here: [**https://hassan.bsd.net/March-2019**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc28b/2a380d31/3b789d36/f11a29/806925388/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDMzMF9FT1EzXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190330_EOQ3_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

Let me explain why this is so important:
Every quarter, we have to report our fundraising totals to the FEC. The FEC then turns our numbers public, and campaign experts use them to gauge the strength of our campaign.
In 2016, we won our race by just 1,017 votes -- a mere fraction of a percent. **If the number we report shows any signs of slipping, it tells Republicans that we're vulnerable, and I worry that we 'll lose this seat.**
Look, a gift from you could be the thing that puts us back on track so I have to ask: [**Please donate $3 or as much as you can right now so that we can finish March with fundraising numbers that we can all be proud of.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc28b/2a380d31/3b789d36/f11a29/806925388/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDMzMF9FT1EzXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190330_EOQ3_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you for helping out, I mean it when I say that I appreciate it.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc28b/2a380d31/3b789d36/f11a2a/806925388/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDMzMF9FT1EzXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190330_EOQ3_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
“Robert Mueller’s investigation is over, but questions still abound. Not about collusion, Russian interference or obstruction of justice..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7e7b8c2529&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | **[A Catastrophic Media Failure](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c8cb2abf3&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“Robert Mueller’s investigation is over, but questions still abound. Not about collusion, Russian interference or obstruction of justice, but about the leading lights of journalism who managed to get the story so wrong, and for so long,” Sean Davis writes. “It wasn’t merely an error here or there. America’s blue-chip journalists botched the entire story, from its birth during the presidential campaign to its final breath Sunday—and they never stopped congratulating themselves for it.”

**Watch:** [President Trump delivers a statement on the Special Counsel report](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4a46180a60&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[Accountability for a Dossier](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=628d106f6a&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_The Wall Street Journal_
Now that Special Counsel Robert Mueller has dispatched the Russia collusion theories, _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes, one has to ask “How did the partisan propaganda known as the Steele dossier become the basis for an unprecedented FBI probe of a presidential campaign, an abuse of law enforcement, and two years of media and political hysteria? . . . Its authors and promoters should be held accountable.”
---
|
---
| **[The Media’s Russia ‘Bombshells’ Look Even Worse Now That Mueller Found No Collusion](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=509d5d2e2f&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_The Daily Caller_
“Attorney General William Barr told Congress Sunday that special counsel Robert Mueller did not find collusion between the Trump campaign and the Russian government, destroying two years of media speculation and bad reporting,” Amber Athey writes. “In light of Mueller concluding his investigation, we’ve compiled a list of some of the worst media screwups in the history of Russia theories.”
---
|
---
| **[Mueller’s Conclusions Expose Disgrace of Obama’s Spy Chiefs](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=31851feb3d&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_New York Post_
“Of all the reputations in tatters now that Robert Mueller has exploded the Russian-collusion fantasy, Obama-era spy chiefs John Brennan and James Clapper stand out,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. “These two weren’t average citizens: They spoke with the authority of having headed federal intel operations”—breaking a longstanding precedent of former top law enforcement officials steering clear of politics.
---
|
---
| **[Border Hits ‘Breaking Point’ in El Paso, CBP Commissioner Says](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=021d07f7be&e=3ee4985eea)**
-Fox News
“The nation’s top border security official said Wednesday that the border is at its ‘breaking point’ during a visit to Texas, where as many as 1,000 migrants crossed into the U.S. and there are not enough agents to respond,” Louis Casiano reports. U.S. Customs and Border Protection Commissioner Kevin K. McAleenan said that “CBP is facing an unprecedented humanitarian and border security crisis.”
---
|
---
| **[Trump’s Golan Decision Is Moral and Strategic](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2d5dc41df6&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_The Wall Street Journal_
The President “tweeted last week that the U.S. will formally recognize the Golan Heights as part of Israel. The decision is strategically wise and morally important,” Sen. Lindsey Graham (R-SC) writes. “Mr. Trump has been one of the most effective American leaders in strengthening the country’s relationship with Israel.”

**Watch:** [President Trump meets with Prime Minister Netanyahu](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9161e76560&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[Trump Presents Posthumous Medal of Honor to Army Staff Sergeant Who Died Saving 3 Fellow Soldiers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b985d2322&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_Washington Examiner_
“President Trump on Wednesday awarded a posthumous Congressional Medal of Honor to U.S. Army Staff Sgt. Travis W. Atkins, who heroically sacrificed his life and saved the lives of three fellow soldiers while fighting in Iraq in 2007,” Emily Ward writes. “In his final moments on Earth, Travis did not run,” the President said. “He laid down his life to save the lives of his fellow warriors.”
---
|
---
| [**Tax Reform is No 'Sugar High'**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a5d1862cb2&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Wall Street Journal_
“The current mantra from opponents of the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act is that the strong economic growth that followed is the result of a ‘sugar high,’” Rep. Kevin Brady (R-TX) and economist Lawrence Lindsey write. “These arguments reflect political and ideological wishful thinking, not a substantive analysis of what is happening in the economy.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0f79326df1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=849901df73&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=64d1442332)
---

---

That means that we will be transparent with you about our deadlines, we will ask for your help when we need it, and we'll keep including you in the conversation about how we can improve our country for future generations. | I'm proud to be a part of Abigail's team, and I hope you'll consider supporting her tonight, too. Thanks, Whitney Holt Finance Director Abigail Spanberger For Congress | Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit = If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may = to request fewer emails from Abigail's campaign.
